message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Project Manager" as PM
participant ":System" as System

activate PM
PM -> System : 1 Inicia o processo de atribuição automática de tarefas
activate System
System --> PM : 2 Informa sobre o sucesso da operação
deactivate System
deactivate PM

actor "Project Manager" as PM2
@enduml
